opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've gone downhill really fast over the last three days. I feel like I'm moving through wet cement, I'm freezing to the bone even though the heating is up and I'm under blankets, and I can't think straight or finish a thought. I haven't had the energy to make food for a whole day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's come on fast over three days and I can't get up — I live on my own and I'm scared.

symptom_narrative.onset: about three days ago — I went downhill fast
symptom_narrative.duration: three days, and it's been getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: crushing tiredness, freezing cold, and a foggy head where I can't finish a thought
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — I can't get out of bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — my whole body is exhausted, and my head feels foggy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse each day over the three days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own, and I feel colder if I'm not wrapped up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling the cold really badly, and I've noticed I'm moving and speaking slowly
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had tired patches with my thyroid before, but never anything like this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, I haven't been able to cook or eat much for about a day, and there's no one else here

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: an underactive thyroid — they've told me it's Hashimoto's; I take a tablet for it

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one every morning, same as always

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone; hasn't been able to get up to cook or drink much for about a day because of the exhaustion, and no one is currently checking in.

objective_data_offered.value: my face looks puffy and I look really washed out
my skin feels dry and cold when I touch it
I'm talking and moving really slowly, everything is a huge effort
